protein_name: GTPase-activating protein for Rho family members. Detected in skin fibroblasts (at protein level) (PubMed:8537347). 4 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Molecular Function: GTPase activator activity; GTPase activity; protein binding; SH2 domain binding
raw_fields.Biological Process: cell adhesion; mammary gland development; regulation of cell size; regulation of small GTPase mediated signal transduction; Rho protein signal transduction; signal transduction
raw_fields.Alt. Names/Synonyms: ARHGAP5; GFI2; growth factor independent 2; p100 RasGAP-associated p105 protein; p105 RhoGAP; p190-B; p190BRhoGAP; RHG05; Rho GTPase activating protein 5; Rho GTPase-activating protein 5; Rho-type GTPase-activating protein 5; RHOGAP5
raw_fields.Basal Isoelectric point: 6.18 Predict pI for various phosphorylation states
